allow:
Bash(xargs -I {} python3 -c "
import pickle
import sys

with open\(''{}'', ''rb''\) as f:
    ep = pickle.load\(f\)

print\(f''Termination: {ep.get\(""termination"", ""unknown""\)}''\)
print\(f''Total steps: {len\(ep[""traj""]\)}''\)

final_state = ep[''traj''][-1][0]
goal = ep[''goal'']

import numpy as np
final_x, final_y, final_yaw = final_state[0], final_state[1], final_state[2]

# Calculate car center
L = 0.36
dist_to_center = L/2 - 0.05
cx = final_x + dist_to_center * np.cos\(final_yaw\)
cy = final_y + dist_to_center * np.sin\(final_yaw\)

along_err = abs\(cx - 0.0\) * 100
lateral_err = abs\(cy - goal[1]\) * 100

print\(f''Final errors: along={along_err:.2f}cm, lateral={lateral_err:.2f}cm \(target: <3cm each\)''\)
print\(f''Yaw error: {abs\(final_yaw\)*180/np.pi:.2f} degrees''\)
print\(f''Speed: {abs\(final_state[3]\):.3f} m/s''\)
")
